description: Defines deterministic failure triage categories for Sanguo governance regression harness results.

categories.action: Add or repair the missing phase plan document, then update the phase matrix if needed.
Add the missing validator summary metric or remove the stale required key from validation policy.
Restore the fixture file or update the fixture manifest with the new deterministic path.
Fix fixture manifest JSON syntax and required file references.
Inspect releaseReadiness.checks before treating governance as releasable.
Compare current harness summary against drift policy baselines and update only if the change is intentional.
Add the missing completion ledger plan or mark the phase out of scope in the ledger policy.
